title: Perityle rupestris
taxonomy: Perityle rupestris is classified within the family Asteraceae. This classification places it within the order Asterales and the clade Eudicots. It belongs to the genus Perityle and is native to the Americas. Perityle rupestris is further classified as a species within the subfamily Heliantoideae. Its classification reflects its close relationships with other flowering plants in the Asteraceae family.
uses: Perityle rupestris is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico.
